# ESP32-C6 Super Mini Enclosure v1.0.0

First public release of the **3D-printable enclosure** for **ESP32-C6 Super Mini** + Hilink mini PSU — parametric model **V16.3**.

## Highlights

- Compact snap-fit case with side-by-side board layout
- Press-fit rails for PSU and ESP32-C6 Super Mini
- Front openings: **USB-C** (stadium profile) and **Ø 8 mm** wire pass-through
- Lid secured with **2× M2 × 6 mm** screws
- Bilingual documentation (Portuguese and English)

## External dimensions

| Axis | mm |
|------|-----|
| Width (X) | **45.0** |
| Depth (Y) | **38.3** |
| Assembled height | **24.5** (base 22.5 + lid 2.0) |

## Files in this release

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `base.stl` | Case base (print) |
| `tampa.stl` | Lid (print) |
| `case.scad` | Parametric source (OpenSCAD) — model **V16.3** |
| `case-matter-switch.png` | Photo of printed case |

## Versioning

| Field | Value |
| ----- | ----- |
| Release | `v1.0.0` |
| Parametric model (OpenSCAD) | `V16.3` |

GitHub releases use **semver** (`v1.0.x`). The OpenSCAD model version (`V16.3`) tracks internal design iterations and is documented in release notes.

## Tested in development

- 3D printing in PLA and PETG
- Snap-fit rails for ESP32-C6 Super Mini and Hilink mini PSU
- USB-C opening alignment for deploy/debug
- Compatible with [Magic Button (esp32-sw-matter-ota)](https://github.com/cjcoletti/esp32-sw-matter-ota)

- **Not a commercial product** — no official support, warranty, or electrical safety certification
